task_name: Implement Builder Live Read Probe Mock Fallback
goal: Implement the local mock fallback and allowlist validation for the Builder Live Read Probe without live Builder calls, secrets, auth, persistence, or writes.
claims: BP-022 implements only a local mock fallback for the read-only Builder probe.
The probe validates the BP-021 read allowlist and blocks non-GET or non-allowlisted reads.
The probe output always reports writes_attempted=false, decision_ready=false, and requires_human_gate=true.
The existing adapter review suite includes the new probe tests.
assumptions: BP-021 is the governing contract for the read-only probe boundary.
No live Builder URL, secret, auth, or persistence is required for this task.
Fixture-based mock evidence is sufficient for the first reviewable probe line.
dod: tools/builder-live-read-probe.cjs exists and supports mock mode from JSON input.
Allowed GET paths complete with stable mock refs.
Forbidden method and forbidden path inputs produce blocked outputs.
stop_conditions: Live Builder call, base URL, auth, secret, DB, persistence, write, execute, approval, or push integration becomes necessary
A broader adapter architecture change becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-021 allows BP-022 to implement only mock fallback, envelope validation, read allowlist validation, and tests.
